### Overview
Data engineer focused on BigQuery, pipelines, agents, and Gemini. Since you did not specify days, I assumed Wednesday through Friday.

### Schedule
Wednesday, April 22, 2026
- Primary: Build agentic data pipelines with BigQuery and Gemini (id 3001), 09:00-09:45, W301, Not full. Best fit for data pipelines, BigQuery-style analytics, and Gemini.

Thursday, April 23, 2026
- Primary: Secure platform guardrails for production agents (id 3003), 11:00-11:45, T210, Not full. Strong match for agent security and production concerns.

Friday, April 24, 2026
- Primary: Vertex AI agents in production: observability and evals (id 3005), 14:00-14:45, F101, Not full. Best fit for production AI agent operations.

### Tradeoffs
- I deprioritized the more executive-oriented sessions because you asked for a technical data-engineering schedule.
